displayName: Main Gear L Spring Tube Fatigue
inspectionMethod: visual crack inspection, eddy current scan
notes: Spring steel tubular leg; hard landing and g-loads accelerate fatigue.

displayName: Main Gear L Spring Back-set (cumulative)
inspectionMethod: measure spring height under load and at rest
notes: Plastic deformation of spring steel reduces shock absorption over time.

displayName: Main Gear L Attach Bolt Torque Retention
inspectionMethod: torque wrench check, visually inspect locknut condition
notes: Vibration and side-load cycling cause bolt preload loss.

displayName: Main Gear L Axle Nut Torque Retention
inspectionMethod: torque wrench verification, check cotter pin
notes: Rotation and cornering loads loosen the axle nut over time.

displayName: Main Gear L Leg Fairing Crack Count
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of fiberglass fairing for stress cracks
notes: Thermal cycling and UV exposure cause brittle composite cracks.

displayName: Main Gear L Wheel Pant Hardware Looseness
inspectionMethod: visual and tactile check of wheel pant fasteners
notes: Vibration from rough taxiway surfaces loosens rivets and screws.

displayName: Main Gear L Wheel Pant Crack Count
inspectionMethod: visual inspection under natural light and with borescope
notes: Thermal cycling and vibration induce fatigue cracks in aluminum skin.

displayName: Main Gear R Spring Tube Fatigue
inspectionMethod: visual crack inspection, eddy current scan
notes: Spring steel tubular leg; hard landing and g-loads accelerate fatigue.

displayName: Main Gear R Spring Back-set (cumulative)
inspectionMethod: measure spring height under load and at rest
notes: Plastic deformation of spring steel reduces shock absorption over time.

displayName: Main Gear R Attach Bolt Torque Retention
inspectionMethod: torque wrench check, visually inspect locknut condition
notes: Vibration and side-load cycling cause bolt preload loss.

displayName: Main Gear R Axle Nut Torque Retention
inspectionMethod: torque wrench verification, check cotter pin
notes: Rotation and cornering loads loosen the axle nut over time.

displayName: Main Gear R Leg Fairing Crack Count
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of fiberglass fairing for stress cracks
notes: Thermal cycling and UV exposure cause brittle composite cracks.

displayName: Main Gear R Wheel Pant Hardware Looseness
inspectionMethod: visual and tactile check of wheel pant fasteners
notes: Vibration from rough taxiway surfaces loosens rivets and screws.

displayName: Main Gear R Wheel Pant Crack Count
inspectionMethod: visual inspection under natural light and with borescope
notes: Thermal cycling and vibration induce fatigue cracks in aluminum skin.

displayName: Main Gear Step Bracket Crack Count
inspectionMethod: visual inspection for stress cracks at bracket welds
notes: Step bracket welds concentrate landing loads; fatigue cracks develop quickly.

displayName: Brake Torque Plate Bolts L Retention
inspectionMethod: torque wrench check on all torque plate fasteners
notes: Brake actuation vibration and reaction torque loosen bolts progressively.

displayName: Brake Torque Plate Bolts R Retention
inspectionMethod: torque wrench check on all torque plate fasteners
notes: Brake actuation vibration and reaction torque loosen bolts progressively.

displayName: Nose Gear Oleo Air Pressure
inspectionMethod: pressure gauge check on oleo air valve
notes: Air diffuses through seals and escapes over time; pressure loss softens strut.

displayName: Nose Gear Oleo Oil Level
inspectionMethod: visual sight-glass inspection
notes: Oil seepage and internal losses reduce damping fluid volume over service.

displayName: Nose Gear Oleo Seal Leak Rate
inspectionMethod: wipe seal area and inspect for fresh oil seepage after landing
notes: Hard landings and thermal cycling degrade seal elastomer; oil weeps out.

displayName: Nose Gear Oleo Extension at Static Weight
inspectionMethod: measure strut compression with aircraft on jacks
notes: Soft air pressure and oil loss reduce strut spring constant; nose rides lower.

displayName: Nose Gear Shimmy Damper Fluid Level
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of fluid level sight glass
notes: Vibration and thermal cycling cause gradual fluid loss from damper.

displayName: Nose Gear Shimmy Damper Bushings Wear
inspectionMethod: visual inspection and durometer hardness test of rubber bushings
notes: UV and thermal ozone cracking harden and embrittle elastomer bushings.

displayName: Nose Gear Torque Link Upper Bushings Wear
inspectionMethod: measure radial and axial play at upper bushing with dial indicator
notes: Cornering loads and braking torque wear rubber bushings through friction.

displayName: Nose Gear Torque Link Lower Bushings Wear
inspectionMethod: measure radial and axial play at lower bushing with dial indicator
notes: Brake torque and turn loads induce cyclic wear in lower torque link bushings.

displayName: Nose Gear Torque Link Bolt Elongation
inspectionMethod: measure bolt length with micrometer before and after landing cycles
notes: High g-loads and hard braking cause plastic elongation of torque link bolts.

displayName: Nose Gear Fork Bushings Wear
inspectionMethod: measure radial clearance at fork bushing with dial indicator
notes: Rotation of wheel and steering inputs wear fork bearings.

displayName: Nose Gear Steering Rod Ends Wear
inspectionMethod: grasp steering rod and measure lateral play with dial indicator
notes: Steering column oscillation and torsion wear ball joints in rod ends.

displayName: Nose Gear Steering Bungee Spring Set
inspectionMethod: apply known steering displacement; measure return force and hysteresis
notes: Bungee cord ages and permanently stretches under tensile cycling.

displayName: Nose Gear Attach Lug Fatigue
inspectionMethod: visual crack inspection, eddy current scan of attach lugs
notes: Fuselage attach points experience cyclic tension from landing loads.

displayName: Nose Gear Strut Tube Internal Corrosion
inspectionMethod: borescope inspection of strut bore; tap test for deep pitting
notes: Saltwater exposure and moisture ingress cause internal corrosion.

displayName: Wheel L Main Halves Bolt Torque
inspectionMethod: torque wrench check on all wheel half bolts
notes: Radial and tangential loads from braking and cornering relax bolt preload.

displayName: Wheel L Main Bearing Cone Inboard Wear
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of bearing raceway for spalling; measure groove depth
notes: Rotation and radial loads induce gradual racetrack wear in bearing cone.

displayName: Wheel L Main Bearing Cone Outboard Wear
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of bearing raceway for spalling; measure groove depth
notes: Rotation and radial loads induce gradual racetrack wear in bearing cone.

displayName: Wheel L Main Bearing Cup Pitting Severity
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of bearing cup raceway under light
notes: Corrosion and fatigue spalling create stress concentration pits in cup.

displayName: Wheel L Main Grease Seal Lip Condition
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of seal and durometer test
notes: Heat and ozone exposure harden and crack elastomer seals.

displayName: Wheel R Main Halves Bolt Torque
inspectionMethod: torque wrench check on all wheel half bolts
notes: Radial and tangential loads from braking and cornering relax bolt preload.

displayName: Wheel R Main Bearing Cone Inboard Wear
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of bearing raceway for spalling; measure groove depth
notes: Rotation and radial loads induce gradual racetrack wear in bearing cone.

displayName: Wheel R Main Bearing Cone Outboard Wear
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of bearing raceway for spalling; measure groove depth
notes: Rotation and radial loads induce gradual racetrack wear in bearing cone.

displayName: Wheel R Main Bearing Cup Pitting Severity
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of bearing cup raceway under light
notes: Corrosion and fatigue spalling create stress concentration pits in cup.

displayName: Wheel R Main Grease Seal Lip Condition
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of seal and durometer test
notes: Heat and ozone exposure harden and crack elastomer seals.

displayName: Wheel Nose Halves Bolt Torque
inspectionMethod: torque wrench check on all wheel half bolts
notes: Steering and rotation loads relax bolt preload on nose wheel.

displayName: Wheel Nose Bearing Cone Inboard Wear
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of bearing raceway for spalling; measure groove depth
notes: Steering torque and rotation induce wear in nose wheel bearing cone.

displayName: Wheel Nose Bearing Cone Outboard Wear
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of bearing raceway for spalling; measure groove depth
notes: Steering torque and rotation induce wear in nose wheel bearing cone.

displayName: Wheel Nose Bearing Cup Pitting Severity
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of bearing cup raceway under light
notes: Corrosion and fatigue spalling in nose wheel cup from steering loads.

displayName: Wheel Nose Grease Seal Lip Condition
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of seal and durometer test
notes: Heat and ozone exposure harden and crack elastomer seals on nose wheel.

displayName: Valve Stem L Main Core Leak Rate
inspectionMethod: soap bubble test on valve stem; measure pressure decay over time
notes: Valve core elastomer ages and allows slow air seepage.

displayName: Valve Stem L Main Seal Condition
inspectionMethod: visual inspection and durometer hardness test
notes: UV, ozone, and thermal cycling harden and crack valve stem seals.

displayName: Valve Stem R Main Core Leak Rate
inspectionMethod: soap bubble test on valve stem; measure pressure decay over time
notes: Valve core elastomer ages and allows slow air seepage.

displayName: Valve Stem R Main Seal Condition
inspectionMethod: visual inspection and durometer hardness test
notes: UV, ozone, and thermal cycling harden and crack valve stem seals.

displayName: Valve Stem Nose Core Leak Rate
inspectionMethod: soap bubble test on valve stem; measure pressure decay over time
notes: Valve core elastomer ages and allows slow air seepage on nose tire.

displayName: Valve Stem Nose Seal Condition
inspectionMethod: visual inspection and durometer hardness test
notes: UV, ozone, and thermal cycling harden and crack valve stem seals.

displayName: Tire L Main Tread Depth
inspectionMethod: tread depth gauge measurement at multiple circumferential points
notes: Friction and braking wear reduce tread depth progressively.

displayName: Tire L Main Cord Exposure Flag
inspectionMethod: visual inspection for exposed fabric cords
notes: Tread wear below legal limit exposes structural cords.

displayName: Tire L Main Sidewall Cracking Severity
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of sidewall under light; count and measure cracks
notes: UV, ozone, and thermal cycling cause rubber hardening and crazing.

displayName: Tire L Main Pressure Deviation from Spec
inspectionMethod: tire pressure gauge measurement
notes: Slow leaks and thermal expansion cause pressure drift.

displayName: Tire L Main DOT Date Age
inspectionMethod: read DOT date code on tire sidewall; calculate age
notes: Rubber compound degrades with age regardless of mileage.

displayName: Tire L Main Flat-Spot Scallop Depth
inspectionMethod: measure radial runout of tire with dial indicator at flat area
notes: Hard braking or flat-spot events from skidding create local wear.

displayName: Tire L Main Tube Leak Rate
inspectionMethod: inflate tire; submerge in water and observe bubble rate
notes: Inner tube aging and valve deterioration cause slow leaks.

displayName: Tire R Main Tread Depth
inspectionMethod: tread depth gauge measurement at multiple circumferential points
notes: Friction and braking wear reduce tread depth progressively.

displayName: Tire R Main Cord Exposure Flag
inspectionMethod: visual inspection for exposed fabric cords
notes: Tread wear below legal limit exposes structural cords.

displayName: Tire R Main Sidewall Cracking Severity
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of sidewall under light; count and measure cracks
notes: UV, ozone, and thermal cycling cause rubber hardening and crazing.

displayName: Tire R Main Pressure Deviation from Spec
inspectionMethod: tire pressure gauge measurement
notes: Slow leaks and thermal expansion cause pressure drift.

displayName: Tire R Main DOT Date Age
inspectionMethod: read DOT date code on tire sidewall; calculate age
notes: Rubber compound degrades with age regardless of mileage.

displayName: Tire R Main Flat-Spot Scallop Depth
inspectionMethod: measure radial runout of tire with dial indicator at flat area
notes: Hard braking or flat-spot events from skidding create local wear.

displayName: Tire R Main Tube Leak Rate
inspectionMethod: inflate tire; submerge in water and observe bubble rate
notes: Inner tube aging and valve deterioration cause slow leaks.

displayName: Tire Nose Tread Depth
inspectionMethod: tread depth gauge measurement at multiple circumferential points
notes: Steering and rotation wear nose tire tread faster than mains.

displayName: Tire Nose Cord Exposure Flag
inspectionMethod: visual inspection for exposed fabric cords
notes: Tread wear below legal limit exposes structural cords.

displayName: Tire Nose Sidewall Cracking Severity
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of sidewall under light; count and measure cracks
notes: UV, ozone, and thermal cycling cause rubber hardening and crazing.

displayName: Tire Nose Pressure Deviation from Spec
inspectionMethod: tire pressure gauge measurement
notes: Slow leaks and thermal expansion cause pressure drift.

displayName: Tire Nose DOT Date Age
inspectionMethod: read DOT date code on tire sidewall; calculate age
notes: Rubber compound degrades with age regardless of mileage.

displayName: Tire Nose Flat-Spot Scallop Depth
inspectionMethod: measure radial runout of tire with dial indicator at flat area
notes: Hard braking or flat-spot events from skidding create local wear.

displayName: Tire Nose Tube Leak Rate
inspectionMethod: inflate tire; submerge in water and observe bubble rate
notes: Inner tube aging and valve deterioration cause slow leaks.

displayName: Brake L Pad Lining Thickness Inboard
inspectionMethod: measure pad thickness with calipers or feeler gauge
notes: Friction wear ablates lining material during braking events.

displayName: Brake L Pad Lining Thickness Outboard
inspectionMethod: measure pad thickness with calipers or feeler gauge
notes: Friction wear ablates lining material during braking events.

displayName: Brake L Disc Thickness
inspectionMethod: measure disc thickness with micrometer at multiple radii
notes: Friction ablates disc material; thermal stress causes plastic thinning.

displayName: Brake L Disc Warp (TIR)
inspectionMethod: mount disc on runout indicator; measure TIR at 0.25 in from outer edge
notes: Uneven heating and rapid cooling warp disc axially.

displayName: Brake L Disc Heat-Checking Severity
inspectionMethod: visual inspection under light for fine thermal stress cracks
notes: Repeated high-temperature cycling induces fine thermal cracking.

displayName: Brake L Caliper Piston Seal Condition
inspectionMethod: visual inspection and durometer hardness test of seal
notes: Heat and pressure cycles degrade piston seal elastomer.

displayName: Brake L Bleed Valve Seat Condition
inspectionMethod: open bleed valve; inspect valve seat for corrosion or debris
notes: Moisture and particulates corrode and foul bleed valve seats.

displayName: Brake L Hose Internal Liner Aging
inspectionMethod: cut hose sample and test durometer hardness of inner liner
notes: Heat and fluid chemistry degrade hose elastomer over time.

displayName: Brake L Master Cylinder Seal Condition
inspectionMethod: visual inspection and durometer hardness test of seal
notes: Pressure cycling and heat harden and crack master cylinder seals.

displayName: Brake R Pad Lining Thickness Inboard
inspectionMethod: measure pad thickness with calipers or feeler gauge
notes: Friction wear ablates lining material during braking events.

displayName: Brake R Pad Lining Thickness Outboard
inspectionMethod: measure pad thickness with calipers or feeler gauge
notes: Friction wear ablates lining material during braking events.

displayName: Brake R Disc Thickness
inspectionMethod: measure disc thickness with micrometer at multiple radii
notes: Friction ablates disc material; thermal stress causes plastic thinning.

displayName: Brake R Disc Warp (TIR)
inspectionMethod: mount disc on runout indicator; measure TIR at 0.25 in from outer edge
notes: Uneven heating and rapid cooling warp disc axially.

displayName: Brake R Disc Heat-Checking Severity
inspectionMethod: visual inspection under light for fine thermal stress cracks
notes: Repeated high-temperature cycling induces fine thermal cracking.

displayName: Brake R Caliper Piston Seal Condition
inspectionMethod: visual inspection and durometer hardness test of seal
notes: Heat and pressure cycles degrade piston seal elastomer.

displayName: Brake R Bleed Valve Seat Condition
inspectionMethod: open bleed valve; inspect valve seat for corrosion or debris
notes: Moisture and particulates corrode and foul bleed valve seats.

displayName: Brake R Hose Internal Liner Aging
inspectionMethod: cut hose sample and test durometer hardness of inner liner
notes: Heat and fluid chemistry degrade hose elastomer over time.

displayName: Brake R Master Cylinder Seal Condition
inspectionMethod: visual inspection and durometer hardness test of seal
notes: Pressure cycling and heat harden and crack master cylinder seals.

displayName: Brake Fluid Moisture Content
inspectionMethod: Karl Fischer coulometric titration of fluid sample
notes: Hygroscopic brake fluid absorbs moisture from humid air.

displayName: Brake Fluid Reservoir Level
inspectionMethod: visual inspection of reservoir fluid level
notes: Seal leakage and evaporation deplete reservoir fluid slowly.

displayName: Parking Brake Valve Seat Condition
inspectionMethod: actuate parking brake and inspect valve for leakage
notes: Contamination and corrosion degrade parking brake valve seat.
